name: Santiago Arredondo Torres
title: Systems Engineer and Data Analyst
summary: Systems Engineer and Data Analyst with over 6 years of experience in IT. Background in banking, journalism, and multimedia projects. Skilled in Python, SQL, Power BI, and web scraping. English level B2+ and a strong focus on leadership, mentoring, and talent development.

experience.summary: As a Level 3 Support Engineer, I contributed to projects focused on critical incident handling, updates, requirement analysis, and application migration management.
highlights: Led support for subscription and data management applications; built ETL-based monitoring and automation for user creation, page updates, and test validation.
Managed chatbot migrations across platforms, working with clients to define requirements and improve performance.
Served as a banking system support key member, resolving incidents and driving continuous improvements.
Mentored internship participants and later coordinated program content, interviews, and career coaching.

experience.summary: Participated in technical workshops and practical challenges; collaborated on an internal IoT project covering analysis, development, and tracking.

certifications.name: Curso de Introduccion a Amazon Web Services (AWS) desde cero
Introduction to Data Visualization in Python
